name: classify_attendance_late_present_functional
description: Checks that an employee who checks in late but within the grace period is classified as Late Present.
input: POST /classify with AttendanceInput: employee_id='E002', checkin_time='09:08', shift_start='09:00', grace_period=10, leave_status='None', holiday_status='None', date='2024-06-01'
output: AttendanceOutput with success=True, attendance_status='Late Present', message containing 'Late Present'
